title: Invalid request error during image-to-image generation
symptom: The workflow fails at the 'Get Result' node with an error stating 'Your request is invalid or could not be processed by the service'. This occurs when trying to generate images using inputs from local files.
root_cause: The error arises because the binary data from the local files is not being correctly formatted into a base64 string that the service can process. The request fails if the data is not properly encoded or if the service cannot access the provided URL.
fix_steps: Replace the existing expression in the workflow with the provided base64 encoding expression.
Add a loop to check the status of the request after sending it.
agent_instruction: Update the expression for encoding binary data to base64 and implement a status check loop in the workflow.
